title: Evaluate scVI vs harmonypy integration (reproducibility tradeoff)
context: Backlog — open question (PLAN §16 Q2). Compare scVI vs harmonypy integration on the reproducibility tradeoff. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Evaluate scVI vs harmonypy for dataset integration, documenting the determinism/reproducibility tradeoff and a recommendation.
acceptanceCriteria: Both methods run on the same inputs with versions and params recorded.
Recommendation stated with caveats; results reproducible by an independent runner.
